mainText.title: Product
mainText.description: We display products based on the latest products we have, if you want to see our old products please enter the name of the item

assistant.title: How can I help?
assistant.subtitle: This is a quick site helper. It can point you to the right page and speed up common actions.
assistant.greeting: I can quickly help you find the cart, open categories, or explain how checkout works.

suggestions.checkout: How do I place an order?

answers.checkoutAuth: Checkout starts from the cart. Open it, review your items, and confirm the purchase for one item or the whole cart.
answers.checkoutGuest: You need to sign in first. After that, the cart will be available and you can complete the order there.
answers.cartFilled: Your cart is ready: {count} items for ${total}. I can open it right away.
answers.cartEmpty: The cart is available from the header and on its own page. It is empty right now, but I can open it for you.
answers.categories: The categories page helps you browse products by direction. Open it now?
answers.categoriesCurrent: You are already on the categories page. Pick a direction to continue browsing products.
